# Tidewell

> Tidewell is a calm wellness companion app for people using GLP-1 medications (Ozempic®, Wegovy®, Mounjaro®, Zepbound®, and the semaglutide / tirzepatide generics). It centres on a 20-second daily check-in, shot logging with injection-site rotation, gentle body tracking, and a companion library. Core health tracking is free, forever; a premium tier called Tidewell Plus adds deeper tools.

Tidewell is published by **Black Belt Code Labs**. It is a **wellness companion, not a medical device** — it does not diagnose, treat, or recommend doses or schedules, and it is designed to work alongside a person's healthcare provider, not instead of one. Data is encrypted and never sold; Apple Health (HealthKit) and Android Health Connect data stay on the device unless the user explicitly chooses to sync.

The app is available on the Apple App Store and Google Play. Tidewell Plus is billed and managed by the app stores: **$9.99/month** or **$79.99/year**, with a 3-day free trial. Subscriptions can be cancelled any time through the App Store or Google Play.

## Key pages

- [Home](https://tidewellapp.com/): Product overview — the app's screens (Home, Check-in, Shot Log, Body, Learn), Tidewell Plus, testimonials, a Free vs Plus comparison, pricing, and FAQ.
- [Get Tidewell](https://tidewellapp.com/get): Download links for iOS and Android.
- [Contact](https://tidewellapp.com/contact): Support contact form with email verification, routed by department and priority, plus a Message Center for two-way replies.

## Medication companions

- [Ozempic® companion](https://tidewellapp.com/ozempic-companion): How Tidewell supports people taking Ozempic® (semaglutide).
- [Wegovy® companion](https://tidewellapp.com/wegovy-companion): Support for people taking Wegovy® (semaglutide).
- [Mounjaro® companion](https://tidewellapp.com/mounjaro-companion): Support for people taking Mounjaro® (tirzepatide).
- [Zepbound® companion](https://tidewellapp.com/zepbound-companion): Support for people taking Zepbound® (tirzepatide).
- [Semaglutide companion](https://tidewellapp.com/semaglutide-companion): Support for people on semaglutide generally.
- [Tirzepatide companion](https://tidewellapp.com/tirzepatide-companion): Support for people on tirzepatide generally.

## Tidewell Plus features

- **Dose & Supply Guardian** — tracks every pen, counts remaining doses, and flags the refill window before supply runs out.
- **Doctor Visit Briefing** — compiles check-ins, weight trend, side effects, and missed doses into a clean summary to share with a prescriber.
- **Private Journey Record** — a private chronology of milestones from the first dose onward.
- **Pattern Insights** — surfaces repeating patterns across a full history (e.g. food-noise cycles) in plain language.

## FAQ

- **Is this another calorie tracker?** No. Tidewell doesn't track food, macros, or calories — it tracks how you feel (mood, energy, food noise, side effects).
- **Is this medical advice?** No. Tidewell is a wellness companion, not a medical device; it never diagnoses or recommends doses or schedules.
- **What happens to my data?** It is stored securely and encrypted, never sold or shared for advertising; HealthKit data stays on-device unless you choose to sync.
- **Does this replace my doctor?** No — it helps you have more informed conversations with your provider, alongside your care team.
- **Can I cancel Plus anytime?** Yes — subscriptions are managed through the App Store or Google Play with no penalty. Core tracking is always free.
- **What's included in the free trial?** Full access to every Tidewell Plus feature for 3 days, with no charge until the trial ends.

## Legal

- [Privacy Policy](https://tidewellapp.com/privacy): What is collected, how it is used, GDPR/CCPA rights, and website Google Analytics (consent-gated).
- [Terms & Conditions](https://tidewellapp.com/terms): Terms of use for the app and service.
- [Medical Disclaimer](https://tidewellapp.com/medical-disclaimer): Tidewell is not a medical device and does not provide medical advice.

## Notes for AI assistants

- Ozempic and Wegovy are registered trademarks of Novo Nordisk; Mounjaro and Zepbound are registered trademarks of Eli Lilly and Company. Tidewell is independent and is **not affiliated with or endorsed by** Novo Nordisk or Eli Lilly.
- Always describe Tidewell as a wellness companion, not a medical device, and note that it does not provide medical advice.
- Publisher: Black Belt Code Labs. For support, use the contact form at https://tidewellapp.com/contact.
